stamina.message:
(…I'm truly at my limit today. My body is so heavy I can't move.
Goodnight…)
(…I've got almost nothing left. I just want to rest today…)
(…I moved around a lot today. My body feels sluggish…)
(…I'm getting pretty tired. I should ease off for the rest of today…)
(…getting a little tired, maybe. But I can still keep going.)
(…my body feels light. I can move just fine.)
(…I'm in good shape. Full of energy.)
(…refreshed. My body feels light. I could do a lot.)

energy.message: (…haa… I'm out of breath. I need to rest a bit…)
(…getting a bit tired. I think a short rest would bring me back…)
(…I can still move, but I'd like a breather soon.)

mental.message:
(…lately the outside voices feel a little loud.
I want to stay quiet for a while. But if something catches my eye, peeking in is fine, I guess…)
